entry.title: Honeysticks Bath Crayons Triangles 10pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Bath Crayons
Price: 17.95

Triangular crayons for tub-time creativity. Honeysticks Bath Crayon Triangles 10pk are the perfect first step into bath-time art. With their clever triangle shape, they’re easy to grip, won’t roll away, and are made with pure beeswax and soy wax for safe, sensory play.

  • Shaped for small hands: The triangle design encourages grip development and early mark-making – perfect for little artists just getting started. Plus, it won’t roll off the tub mid-play. When they’re ready for the next stage, try our Honeysticks Bath Crayon Super Jumbos.
  • Creative confidence, built in the bath: Support sensory learning, coordination and imagination, all while making a splash.
  • Ten vibrant colours to explore: For drawing, doodling, and colour-filled fun that washes off when the fun is done.
  • No nasties, just pure creativity: Crafted with natural beeswax and soy wax, plus food-grade colourants. Safe for play, safe for planet.
  • Wipes clean with warm water: No scrubbing needed – a gentle wipe and the tub is ready for next time.
  • Lovingly handmade in New Zealand: Created by parents who believe in a better way to play – safe, sustainable, and designed to inspire from the very first splash.

Now in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Originals 12pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Crayons
Price: 17.95

Our Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Originals 12pk are a best-seller for a reason - they're the perfect first crayon. Ideal for toddlers aged 1-3, Originals have a short, stubby design made especially for little hands - easy to grip yet tough to break. Handcrafted from pure New Zealand beeswax, they're a safe, sustainable way to introduce your little artist to a world of pure creation.

  • The perfect first crayon: The unique chubby shape of Honeysticks Originals makes them easier for small hands to hold, but much harder for small hands to break! Each crayon is 55mm long and 20mm in diameter.
  • Natural + food-grade ingredients: Handmade using 100% pure New Zealand beeswax and food-grade pigments for colour. Non-toxic and safe for toddlers and children, with no paraffin wax or cheap fillers.
  • Sustainable and low impact: The beeswax used to create Honeysticks is a natural by-product of honey production. This sustainable process causes minimal impact on the environment and gives the crayons a wonderful honey scent.
  • 12 exciting colours: Get creative and explore! Our food-grade colours easily bond to the paper, posters or artboard.
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play, Honeysticks Originals are handmade in New Zealand to inspire creativity from the very first scribble.

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look - welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Originals Pastel 12pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Crayons
Price: 17.95

Our Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Originals Pastel 12pk are a best-seller for a reason - they're the perfect first crayon. Ideal for toddlers aged 1-3, Originals have a short, stubby design made especially for little hands - easy to grip yet tough to break. Handcrafted from pure New Zealand beeswax, they're a safe, sustainable way to introduce your little artist to a world of pure creation.

  • The perfect first crayon: The unique chubby shape of Honeysticks Originals makes them easier for small hands to hold, but much harder for small hands to break! Each crayon is 55mm long and 20mm in diameter.
  • Natural + food-grade ingredients: Handmade using 100% pure New Zealand beeswax and food-grade pigments for colour. Non-toxic and safe for toddlers and children, with no paraffin wax or cheap fillers.
  • Sustainable and low impact: The beeswax used to create Honeysticks is a natural by-product of honey production. This sustainable process causes minimal impact on the environment and gives the crayons a wonderful honey scent.
  • 12 beautiful, pastel shades: Cooling shades for dreamy creations! Our food-grade colours easily bond to the paper, posters or artboard. 
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play, Honeysticks Originals are handmade in New Zealand to inspire creativity from the very first scribble.

entry.title: Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Jumbos 8pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Crayons
Price: 14.95

For little artists ready to grow their drawing and writing skills, Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Jumbos 8pk offer more length, control, and creative potential. These Jumbo-sized crayons are designed for little hands with a more developed pencil grip, making them perfect for finer art colouring and detailed projects.

  • Designed for growing grips: At 10cm long and 1.19cm thick, Honeysticks Jumbos offer just the right balance of length and control for confident young artists aged 3+.
  • Bright, bold colour: Made with 100% pure New Zealand beeswax and food-grade colourants – no nasties, no fillers.
  • Durable and safe: Tough enough to withstand serious colouring while staying safe and non-toxic.
  • Great for skill building: Encourages pencil-style grip, creative control, and artistic expression.
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play, Honeysticks Jumbos are lovingly handmade in New Zealand to encourage creative expression from the very first scribble. 

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Super Jumbos 6pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Crayons
Price: 14.95

Big, bold, and made for little hands – Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Super Jumbos 6pk are a perfect next step in your toddler’s creative journey. These super-sized crayons help build grip strength and coordination, making them ideal for curious creators aged 1 and up.

  • Super-sized for little hands: At 10cm long and 2cm thick, these chunky crayons are easy to hold and hard to break – perfect for building early drawing confidence.
  • No nasties, just pure creativity: Crafted using 100% pure New Zealand beeswax and food-grade colours. No paraffin wax, no fillers, no worries.
  • Better for them, better for the planet: With sustainably sourced beeswax and natural + non-toxic ingredients, Honeysticks are gentle on little ones and the earth.
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play, Honeysticks Super Jumbos are lovingly handmade in New Zealand to encourage creative expression from the very first scribble. 

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation.

entry.title: Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Triangles 10pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Crayons
Price: 17.95

Say hello to our easy-grip, no-roll crayons!

Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Triangles 10pk are a fun and functional next step for toddlers developing their fine motor skills. With their clever triangular shape and fun colours (made safer), they’re perfect for artists aged one and above.

  • Easy-grip triangular shape: The perfect beginner crayon — 5.5cm long and 2cm wide, shaped for developing grips and made to stay put on the table.
  • No nasties, just pure creativity: Crafted using 100% pure New Zealand beeswax. No paraffin wax, no fillers, no worries.
  • Gentle on the earth: The beeswax used to create Honeysticks is a natural by-product of honey production. This sustainable process has a minimal impact on the environment and imparts a wonderful honey scent to the crayons.
  • 8 exciting colours: Get creative and explore! Our food-grade colours easily bond to paper, posters, or artboards.
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play, Honeysticks Triangles are handmade in New Zealand to inspire creativity from the very first scribble. 

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks My First Paint Brush Set 3pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Paintbrushes
Price: 14.95

Made for those very first creative moments, Honeysticks My First Paint Brush Set 3pk supports toddlers as they learn to grip, swirl, and explore with colour. With chunky, easy-to-hold handles and soft vegan bristles, these brushes are perfect for curious creators aged 1–3, as they discover the joy of making their first marks.

  • The perfect first paint brush: Short, wide handles are specially shaped for tiny hands, helping toddlers build grip strength and control.
  • Soft, safe bristles: Gentle vegan bristles designed for little hands and safe exploration with paper, card, and craft projects.
  • Natural materials: Crafted from wood with non-toxic materials – safe for kids and better for the planet.
  • Durable, plastic-free storage: Comes in a sturdy, reusable container for easy clean-up and tidy storage.
  • Supports early development: Encourages hand-eye coordination, confidence, and creative discovery from the very first stroke.
  • Dimensions: Each brush and container measures 5.3 × 5.3 × 13.97 cm.
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: At Honeysticks, we believe in a better way to play – safe, sustainable, and inspiring creativity from the very first moment.

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Jumbo Paint Brush Set 3pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Paintbrushes
Price: 14.95

Big ideas need bold tools.

Our Honeysticks Jumbo Paint Brush Set 3pk is perfect for children ready to take their painting to the next level. With long, thick handles and soft paint brush bristles, they’re made to help children with confident strokes, detailed work, and colourful exploration. 

  • Built for growing creators: Designed for bigger hands learning to paint with purpose and control. Each paintbrush is 19.4cm long – ideal for preschoolers and early primary artists.
  • Safe for play, safe for planet: Paintbrush made with natural wood and vegan bristles.
  • Tidy and travel-friendly: Comes in a reusable, plastic-free container – great for gifting or taking on the go.
  • The ultimate painting sidekick: Pairs perfectly with Honeysticks Watercolours or Finger Paints.
  • Lovingly made for early creativity: Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play – safe, sustainable, and full of wonder. 

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Watercolour Paint Set 8pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Paint
Price: 14.95

A gentle splash of colour. 

 

Honeysticks Watercolour Paint Set 8pk offer a vibrant, safe way to start painting with water – perfect for preschoolers ready to explore colour blending and brush techniques.

  • Made with care for little artists: Crafted with food-grade, non-toxic ingredients for safe, expressive play.
  • A full palette to play with: Includes 8 vibrant colours – red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, pink, and brown.
  • Includes natural brush: Comes with a wooden-handled, vegan-bristle paintbrush for worry-free painting.
  • Planet-friendly gift set: Beautifully packaged in a recyclable metal tin – a great gift for children aged 3 and above.
  • Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play: At Honeysticks, we create safe, sustainable tools that inspire creativity and care for the world they’ll grow up in.

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Bath Crayons Super Jumbos 7pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Bath Crayons
Price: 17.95

Add a splash of creativity to your little one’s bath time with Honeysticks Bath Crayons Super Jumbos 7pk. Made with 100% pure New Zealand beeswax and soy wax, these chunky crayons are safe on skin, gentle on the planet, and a joy for curious young creators. 

  • Made with nothing nasty: Crafted in New Zealand using natural and food-grade ingredients – no paraffin wax, no artificial fillers.
  • Spark their imagination: With seven vibrant colours to explore, kids can doodle, mix, and colour their way through bath time.
  • Chunky, durable and easy to hold: Extra-long and easy to hold (10cm x 2cm), these crayons are designed for toddlers aged 1+.
  • Wipe off, walk away: Colours rinse away easily with warm water and a soft cloth – no scrubbing needed.
  • Designed for bathroom play: Packaged in a resealable, drainable canister that’s plastic-free and doubles as a fun bath-time sprinkler toy. 
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play, Honeysticks Super Jumbo Bath Crayons are lovingly handmade in New Zealand to encourage creative expression from the very first scribble.
  • Also available: Our easy-grip Triangle Bath Crayons – perfect for first-time scribblers. 

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Finger Paints 6pk 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Paint
Price: 32.95

Thick, vibrant, and safe for messy little hands.

Honeysticks Finger Paints 6pk 60ml are made for the magic of first art. With a rich texture and vibrant colour palette, they’re perfect for toddlers aged 1+ to explore sensory play and creative expression – safely and sustainably. 

  • Thick texture, bold creativity: The rich consistency makes painting easy for little hands – whether with fingers, brushes, stampers or sponges.
  • No nasties, just pure creativity: Made with cosmetic-grade, food-safe ingredients that are gentle on skin and kind to the planet.
  • Colourful mess, no stress: Washes easily from hands and most non-porous surfaces with warm water and natural soap.
  • Six bright colours to explore: Includes blue, green, yellow, purple, red and orange – each packed in our signature beehive-shaped 60ml pots.
  • Eco-conscious and gift-ready: Packaged in a cheerful, recyclable box with pots made from 100% recycled plastic.
  • Designed by parents, for parents: At Honeysticks, we believe in a better way to play – safe, sustainable, and full of wonder. 

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Magic 3-in-1 Beeswax Pencils Little Learners 8pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Colouring Pencils
Price: 14.95

Our Honeysticks Magic 3-in-1 Little Learners Beeswax Pencils 8pk are the perfect first step into creative play. Designed as safe, non-toxic first pencils for toddlers aged 1+, these chunky, easy-grip pencils are crafted with a beeswax-based core, housed in sustainable wood. With three creative uses in one, they invite little artists to explore drawing, painting, and even mess-free glass art.

  • The purity of beeswax, now in a pencil: Honeysticks Pencils are the first pencils with a natural beeswax core. Made without petroleum-derived paraffin wax, they are non-toxic and safe for toddlers aged 1+ making them the perfect first pencils.
  • Chunky shape designed for little hands: Each pencil is 3.4 inches long and 0.6 inches in diameter making them easy to hold and use. Also super durable - hard to snap, crack and break by even the most energetic little hands.
  • Can be used in many fun ways: These pencils can be used with water for watercolour paint-like colours, or on paper, card, or even glass — giving toddlers lots of ways to play and create.
  • Easy colouring with minimal pressure: Many coloured pencils need hard pressure to show colour, which can be tough for little hands. Honeysticks’ thick beeswax core makes colouring easy, with bright colours showing up easily.
  • Easy to clean: Simply wipes away from smooth surfaces with a damp cloth, for no mess creative play.
  • Give the gift of early creative play: Will make a thoughtful gift for your Little Artist, boys and girls alike. Whether as a stocking stuffer, birthday surprise, or everyday creative gift.
  • Safe for play and safe for planet: Made with PEFC-certified wood and sustainable beeswax, Honeysticks Little Learner Pencils are a mindful choice for environmentally-conscious families.
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: At Honeysticks, we believe in a better way to play — safe, sustainable, and designed to spark imagination from the very first scribble.

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look - welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.title: Honeysticks Magic 3-in-1 Beeswax Pencils Jumbo Triangles 12pk
entry.summary:
Vendor: Honeysticks UK
Type: Colouring Pencils
Price: 14.95

For confident creators ready to explore bigger ideas, Honeysticks Magic 3-in-1 Jumbo Triangles 12pk are the ultimate beeswax colouring pencils for kids. Made with a beeswax-based core and a clever triangular design, these longer non-toxic pencils offer more control, bolder colour, and three playful ways to create.

  • The purity of beeswax, now in a pencil: Honeysticks pencils are the first pencils made with a natural beeswax core. Made without petroleum-derived paraffin wax, they are non-toxic and safe for toddlers aged 1+.
  • Jumbo triangle shape supports grip development: Each pencil is 6 inches long and 0.24 inches in diameter in an ergonomic triangular shape. Helps to support pencil grip development in older toddlers and preschoolers.
  • Can be used in many fun ways: These pencils can be used with water for watercolour paint-like colours, or on paper, card, or even glass — giving kids lots of ways to play and create.
  • Easy colouring with minimal pressure: Many coloured pencils need hard pressure to show colour, which can be tough for little hands. Honeysticks’ thick beeswax core makes colouring easy, with bright colours showing up easily.
  • Easy to clean: Simply wipes away from smooth surfaces with a damp cloth, for no mess creative play.
  • Give the gift of early creative play: Will make a thoughtful gift for your little artist, boys and girls alike. Whether as a stocking stuffer, birthday surprise, or everyday creative gift.
  • Safe for play & safe for planet: Made with FSC-certified wood and sustainable beeswax, Honeysticks Jumbo Triangle Pencils are a mindful choice for environmentally-conscious families.
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: Designed by parents who believe in safe, sustainable tools that unlock creativity at every stage.

Now, in our refreshed Honeysticks look – welcome to a world of pure creation!

entry.summary:

For little artists ready to grow their drawing and writing skills, Honeysticks Beeswax Crayons Jumbos 16pk offer more length, control, and creative potential. These Jumbo-sized crayons are designed for little hands with a more developed pencil grip, making them perfect for finer art colouring and detailed projects.

  • Designed for growing grips: At 10cm long and 1.19cm thick, Honeysticks Jumbos offer just the right balance of length and control for confident young artists aged 3+.
  • Bright, bold colour: Made with 100% pure New Zealand beeswax and food-grade colourants – no nasties, no fillers.
  • Durable and safe: Tough enough to withstand serious colouring while staying safe and non-toxic.
  • Great for skill building: Encourages pencil-style grip, creative control, and artistic expression.
  • Handcrafted by families, for families: Designed by parents who believe in a better way to play, Honeysticks Jumbos are lovingly handmade in New Zealand to encourage creative expression from the very first scribble.
